entry.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS data_mart.fact_order;%%00010DROP TABLE IF EXISTS data_mart.dim_time;%%00010DROP TABLE IF EXISTS data_mart.dim_customer;%%00010DROP TABLE IF EXISTS data_mart.dim_employee;%%00010DROP TABLE IF EXISTS data_mart.dim_product;%%00010%%00010CREATE TABLE data_mart.dim_time (%%00010 "Date" DATE PRIMARY KEY,%%00010 "DayOfWeekNumber" INTEGER,%%00010 "DayOfWeekName" VARCHAR(255),%%00010 "Month" INTEGER,%%00010 "Quarter" INTEGER,%%00010 "Year" INTEGER,%%00010 "IsWeekend" BOOLEAN%%00010);%%00010%%00010CREATE TABLE data_mart.dim_customer (%%00010 "CustomerID" VARCHAR(10) PRIMARY KEY,%%00010 "CompanyName" VARCHAR(2000),%%00010 "City" VARCHAR(255),%%00010 "Region" VARCHAR(255),%%00010 "Country" VARCHAR(255)%%00010);%%00010%%00010CREATE TABLE data_mart.dim_employee (%%00010 "EmployeeID" INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,%%00010 "Title" VARCHAR(255),%%00010 "ReportsToFullName" VARCHAR(255),%%00010 "FullName" VARCHAR(255)%%00010);%%00010%%00010CREATE TABLE data_mart.dim_product (%%00010 "ProductID" INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,%%00010 "ProductName" VARCHAR(255),%%00010 "UnitPrice" FLOAT,%%00010 "Discontinued" INTEGER,%%00010 "CategoryName" VARCHAR(255)%%00010);%%00010%%00010CREATE TABLE data_mart.fact_order (%%00010 "ID" BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,%%00010 "OrderID" INTEGER,%%00010 "ProductID" INTEGER REFERENCES data_mart.dim_product("ProductID"),%%00010 "CustomerID" VARCHAR(10) REFERENCES data_mart.dim_customer("CustomerID"),%%00010 "EmployeeID" INTEGER REFERENCES data_mart.dim_employee("EmployeeID"),%%00010 "OrderDate" DATE REFERENCES data_mart.dim_time("Date"),%%00010 "Freight" FLOAT,%%00010 "ShipVia" INTEGER,%%00010 "UnitPrice" FLOAT,%%00010 "Quantity" INTEGER,%%00010 "Discount" FLOAT,%%00010 "TotalAmount" FLOAT%%00010);%%00010
